CustomField.formula:
If(BEGINS(Website, "www."), IF(FIND('/', MID(Website, 5, LEN(Website) - 4)) != 0, MID(Website, 5, FIND('/', MID(Website, 5, LEN(Website) - 4)) -1), MID(Website, 5, LEN(Website) - 4)),
If(BEGINS(Website, "http://www."), IF(FIND('/', MID(Website, 12, LEN(Website) - 11)) != 0,MID(Website, 12, FIND('/', MID(Website,12,LEN(Website) - 11)) -1), MID(Website,12,LEN(Website)-11)),
If(BEGINS(Website, "https://www."), IF(FIND('/', MID(Website, 13, LEN(Website) - 12)) != 0,MID(Website, 13, FIND('/', MID(Website,13,LEN(Website) - 12)) -1), MID(Website,13,LEN(Website)-12)),
If(BEGINS(Website, "http://"), IF(FIND('/', MID(Website, 8, LEN(Website) - 7)) != 0,MID(Website, 8, FIND('/', MID(Website,8,LEN(Website) - 7)) -1), MID(Website,8,LEN(Website)-7)),
If(BEGINS(Website, "https://"), IF(FIND('/', MID(Website, 9, LEN(Website) - 8)) != 0,MID(Website, 9, FIND('/', MID(Website,9,LEN(Website) - 8)) -1), MID(Website,9,LEN(Website)-8)),
IF(FIND('/',MID(Website, 1, LEN(Website))) !=0,MID(Website,1,FIND('/', Website) - 1), Website ))))))
CustomField.label: Website Domain
